FLAPPY BIRD
X AI

One prompt. Every model. 36 playable builds comparing what AI coding tools produce from the same spec.

14MODELS 332D BUILDS 33D BUILDS 4ARCHIVED
◆

3D ARCADE

Three models asked to go full 3D — Three.js cranes, voxels and neon tunnels. Hosted as its own mini-site.

enter arcade paperwing · claude fable 5 cyber flight · gemini 3.5 flash flappy voxel · gpt-5.5 xhigh
